text:
--e89a8f839d33f4fdc604c5ded8d3
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 Hi,
 
 I can't find back the original PR, still sysutils/ntfsprogs port
 is in conflict with sysutils/fusefs-ntfs.
 
 We can validate the patch attached to the PR.
 Or we could maybe remove ntfsprogs from ports.
 
 From my point of view, the only interest of ntfsprogs, was that
 it could deal with "advanced" ntfs features (mkfs, resize, ...).
 Now that fusefs-ntfs is mature enough, maybe ntfsprogs is not
 required anymore - plus, its development seems to have stopped
 long ago, I had to patch to add vista/seven $UpCase, ...
 
 If you think it's wiser keeping it, then just validate that PR
 I can't find the number back.
 
 
 Thanks,
 
 
 Regards.
 --=20
 Samuel Mart=EDn Moro
 {EPITECH.} 2011
 SMILE - Open Source Solutions
 
 "Nobody wants to say how this works.
  Maybe nobody knows ..."
                       Xorg.conf(5)
 
 --e89a8f839d33f4fdc604c5ded8d3--
